forumAccountDangerHint: Only if you need it: remove your presence for this branch on the network. This does not delete files on this device.
forumBannedCannotPost: You cannot post in this forum.
forumBanOk: User banned and their messages removed.
forumDailyLimit: Daily posting limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
forumDisabledForTree: This public tree was published without a forum.
forumDeleteMyAccountConfirm: This removes your forum posts and synced progress for this tree from the public network. Local progress in this browser stays. Continue?
forumDeleteMyAccountConfirmFinal: Final confirmation: remove your online identity for this branch? You can still use it here; only the network account is cleared.
forumEmptyNewTopicBody: This topic has no messages yet. Write the first one in the box below.
forumEmptyNewTopicTitle: No posts in this topic yet
forumEmptyThreadsSubtitle: You can also use “+ New topic” in the header.
forumLimitNotice: Privacy note: this forum is community-hosted. Arborito hides posts older than 30 days on this device. In P2P networks, we cannot guarantee deletion of copies stored by third parties.
forumLoginRequiredBody: Sign in to write here. Your local progress on this device is not affected.
forumMasterSelectSectionHint: Pick a section on the left to see discussions for that area.
forumMasterSelectTopicHint: Then choose a topic in the middle list to read messages and join in.
forumModBanUserConfirm: Ban this user AND remove every message they posted in this forum? This cannot be undone.
forumModDeleteMessageConfirm: Remove this message? It won’t appear in new exports. Old shared links may still show it until you publish the tree again.
forumModDeleteThreadConfirm: Delete this topic and all messages? Old shared links may still show a copy until you publish the tree again.
forumModModeBannerHint: Use the inline buttons next to each message and topic to remove them, or “Ban user” to block someone and remove every message they posted in one step.
forumModModeBannerTitle: You are moderating this forum as the owner
forumModPolicyFreeHint: Every signed message publishes immediately. You can still remove messages and ban users after the fact.
forumModPolicyStrictHint: New messages from learners are held in a queue and stay invisible until you approve them.
forumModRejectConfirm: Reject and discard this pending message? The author will not be notified.
forumModRepublishHint: Republish the public tree (construction dock) so new links replace the old snapshot.
forumModUnbanUserConfirm: Unban this user so they can post again? Previously deleted messages will not come back.
forumNeedSyncLogin: Open Profile and sign in with your password to use the forum.
forumNewTopicNeedsBody: Add the first message too (title alone is not enough).
forumNewTopicOpened: Topic published with your first message.
forumNewTopicPlaceholder: Short title, e.g. Question about lesson 3
forumNewTopicSheetHint: Add a title and the opening post for «{place}». Others can reply to the topic or nest replies under any message.
forumNoPublicUniverse: This branch has no online forum (it is not a shared public copy).
forumNoThreadsInPlace: No topics in this section yet.
forumNoTree: To use the forum, open a branch from Forest first.
forumParticipationNeedLoginBody: Sign in from Profile to post in public forums. Your lessons and progress on this device stay safe, an account only enables online participation and sync.
forumParticipationNeedLoginTitle: Sign in to use the forum
forumPendingModerationToast: Your message was sent for review. The tree owner will publish it once approved.
forumPickThread: Choose a topic from the list
forumPickThreadBody: Select a topic in the list. The writing box appears after you open one.
forumPickThreadLead: Open a topic from the list to read and post below. «+ New topic» asks for a title and the first message together.
forumPolicySaveError: Could not save forum moderation policy.
forumPostFailed: Could not send your message. Check your connection and try again.
forumPostShortcutHint: Optional: Ctrl+Enter (⌘+Enter on Mac) to send faster
forumReplyDisabled: Choose a topic from the list first…
forumSelfAccountRemovedBody: Your local learning progress in this browser is unchanged. Your forum posts and encrypted sync for this tree were removed from the network. If you post again, you will use a new identity.
forumSelfDeleteConfirm: Delete your message? This removes it from the public view of this tree.
forumStructureHint: The list follows the branch map: each step to the right sits inside the section above. The publisher sets forum moderation. Use the search field to filter sections by name.
forumStructureHintSummary: Sections follow the branch map; the publisher sets moderation.
forumThreadClipped: Showing the most recent {n} posts in this topic. Older posts are hidden to keep the forum fast.
forumThreadNoMessagesHint: First post: use the box at the bottom, then Publish post.
governanceForumPolicyNoPermission: Only the tree owner (publisher key on this device) can change this.
